nasb.text: Now some of the families of the sons of Kohath had cities of their territory from the tribe of Ephraim.

esv.text: And some of the clans of the sons of Kohath had cities of their territory out of the tribe of Ephraim.

cnv.text: 哥轄子孫的家族中，有些也從以法蓮支派中分得他們境內的城市。

ccb.text: 哥辖的一些宗族从以法莲支派分到城邑，
